chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 702 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.3173/2025 (U/A) 3. For orders on CMA No.3174/2025 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case. 12.08.2025 Mr. Ghulam Mujtaba Sahito, Advocate for the Petitioners >>>>>..<<<<< After arguing the matter at some length, learned counsel for the Petitioners when confronted with the jurisdictional point, on which he referred to letter No.PAR/SUK/2025/03-PS dated 03.01.2025 issued by the Provincial Assistant Registrar, Joint Live Companies Sukkur Region, Sukkur and submits that in spite of said directions, the respondents are not acting upon said letter. He, however, further submits that the respondents have issued a notification for conducting fresh elections though the body duly elected has not completed its tenure which will end on or before 31.12.2025, he, therefore, prays for interference of this Court. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, learned Additional Advocate General Sindh, who is present in connection with other matters waives notice of instant Petition and submits that the Provincial Government with consultation of Honourable Chief Justice of this Court vide notification bearing No.S.JUDL:4-1/2021, Karachi, dated the 3rd. August, 2021, has notified the Tribunals and in this regard the Court of 1st. Senior Civil Judge / Assistant Sessions Judge, Shaheed Benazirabad has been notified to be the Tribunal for said division. Copy of such notification is taken on record. Hence, in view of above position, the Petition in hand served its purpose, therefore, it is hereby disposed of along with pending applications.

Copy of such notification is taken on record. Hence, in view of above position, the Petition in hand served its purpose, therefore, it is hereby disposed of along with pending applications. However, the Petitioner is at liberty to approach the Tribunal by filing proper application, if so advised. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
